summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GuessIt football prediction platform clone - all backend APIs and frontend pages working correctly
passed_tests: GET /api/football/leaderboard returns leaderboard array with 1 user
User can register with email and confirm_password
User can login with same credentials after registration
Admin login works with farhad.isgandar@gmail.com / Salam123? (role: admin)
Homepage loads with header containing GuessIT logo and navigation links
Homepage displays hero banner with carousel
Homepage shows league filter chips and match tabs (Top Matches, Popular, Top Live, Soon, Ended)
Login page loads at /login with Google OAuth button, email/password form, Sign In button
Register page loads at /register with registration form and Google OAuth
/leaderboard page loads with weekly/global tabs and season information
/about page loads with GuessIt description and mission content
/news page loads with 'Latest News' header and empty state message
/contact page loads with contact form and support information
/how-it-works page loads with step-by-step guide and platform features
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (9/9 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (10/10 pages tested successfully)
